name: Ming

skills.name: Good Omens
skills.description: Every 5s, Ming's next Basic Attack deals magical damage and heals himself and the linked teammate. The healing is reduced if the enemy is not a hero.

skills.name: Time - Carefree
skills.description:
Throws his instrument and links it to a teammate, increasing their main attack stat and Attack Speed.
Enemies who touch the link take damage over time.
Passive: Increases Ming's Physical Attack, Magical Attack, and Movement Speed.

skills.name: Mastery - Glide
skills.description:
Throws his instrument and links it to an enemy, reducing their Physical and Magical Defense.
Enemies who touch the link take damage over time.
Passive: Gains Physical and Magical Defense.

skills.name: Peace - Longevity
skills.description: Ming channels for a short time before sacrificing Health to deal true damage to the linked enemy or heal the linked teammate. If linked to both, he does not lose Health.

skillsZh.name: 大吉大利
skillsZh.description: 每過5秒，下次普攻造成較高法術傷害，並從敵人身上激發血球治療法器連接隊友和明世隱。若命中的敵人非英雄，則治療量較低。

skillsZh.name: 臨卦・無憂
skillsZh.description:
明世隱投擲法器連結隊友，增加其主攻屬性和攻速。
觸碰鍊子的敵人持續受到傷害。
被動：自身提升物理攻擊、法術攻擊和移速。

skillsZh.name: 師卦・飛翼
skillsZh.description:
明世隱投擲法器連結敵人，減少其物理防禦和法術防禦。
觸碰鍊子的敵人持續受到傷害。
被動：自身提升物理防禦和法術防禦。

skillsZh.name: 泰卦・長生
skillsZh.description:
明世隱短暫吟唱後，對法器連接的敵人造成真實傷害，對隊友造成回復效果。
如果法器連接了一個目標，明世隱消耗自身生命值對法器連接的敵人造成等量傷害，或對法器連接的隊友回復等量生命值。
如果法器連接了兩個目標，明世隱從敵人身上抽取生命注入隊友。

tips: Build: Boots of Fortitude, Guardian - Starspring, Augur's Word.
tipsZh: 明世隱（遊走）：梯度 B，勝率 50.24%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：影忍之足、近衛・星泉、時之預言.

patchHistory.detail: "Ming will often find himself standing in front of teammates drawing fire as he buffs them. As such, we've slightly increased the recovery he gets from his Passive to give him a bit more room to breathe in battle."

patchHistory.change: Reduced the early game bonus to teammates.
patchHistory.detail: "In the early game, Ming can boost his team's effectiveness when linking with allies, creating a whole that is greater than its parts and further magnifying any advantage gained. In order to alleviate this, we've slightly reduced the early game bonus he provides to allies."

patchHistoryZh.detail: 「明世隱在增強隊友的同時，往往還要在隊友身前吸引火力；我們略微提高了他被動的自身回復效果，讓他在戰鬥中更加從容。」

patchHistoryZh.change: 降低前期對隊友的屬性加成
patchHistoryZh.detail: 明世隱在前期連結隊友時能夠發揮1+1>2的效果，並進一步放大取得的優勢，因此我們適度削弱了前期對隊友的屬性加成效果。

faqs.question: Is Ming good in current season?
faqs.answer: Ming is Tier B Support with 50.24% win rate, 0.47% pick rate, and 0.03% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Ming build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Boots of Fortitude, Guardian - Starspring, Augur's Word, Succubus Cloak, Overlord's Platemail, Breakthrough Robe.

faqs.question: How to counter Ming?
faqs.answer: Pick Wukong, Musashi, Ying. Strong into Cirrus, Menki, Wuyan.

faqsZh.question: 明世隱 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 明世隱 為 B 梯度，勝率 50.24%、選取 0.47%、禁用 0.03%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 明世隱 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：影忍之足、近衛・星泉、時之預言、魔女斗篷、霸者重裝、破繭之衣.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 明世隱？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Wukong、Musashi、Ying。明世隱 克制 Cirrus、Menki、Wuyan。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Cirrus, Menki, Wuyan. Weak into: Wukong, Musashi, Ying.

guide.overview: Ming is a Easy Support (Roaming) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 49.9% win rate and 0.5% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Ming: Every 5s, Ming's next Basic Attack deals more magical damage and heals himself and the linked teammate.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of Tranquility, Breakthrough Robe, Savant's Wrath, then complete Augur's Word, Succubus Cloak. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Fate for stats that match Ming's Support kit. Take Heal — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Time - Carefree → Mastery - Glide → Peace - Longevity → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Peace - Longevity (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Time - Carefree, and Peace - Longevity on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Time - Carefree → Mastery - Glide → Peace - Longevity → weave basic attacks

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Help marksman crash wave, then rotate mid for picks. Return before Tyrant if your carry has no escape.
guide.teamfight: Peel carry first, then look for pick on out-of-position enemies. Ward Tyrant 30s before spawn.
guide.highRank: Ming sits at Tier B globally (49.9% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick.
comparisons: Ming vs Dolia (Support, Tier S): Dolia is 1.8% pick / 46.1% WR. Ming has +3.9% WR vs Dolia in Camp data. Choose Ming when you need Roaming identity; choose Dolia for Roaming comfort.
Ming vs Cai Yan (Support, Tier S): Cai Yan is 1.3% pick / 50.3% WR. Cai Yan wins 0.4% more often globally. Choose Ming when you need Roaming identity; choose Cai Yan for Roaming comfort.

matchups.summary: Ming excels into Cirrus, Menki, Wuyan. Avoid blind picking into Wukong, Musashi, Ying without team peel.
